title: Trump calls US strikes on Iran 'just a love tap,' insists ceasefire still in effect
snippet: President Trump described U.S. retaliatory strikes against Iranian targets as 'just a love tap' and confirmed the ceasefire is in effect. When asked whether the escalation meant the ceasefire had collapsed, Trump responded: 'No, no, the ceasefire is going. It's in effect.' He also warned Iran would face response 'a lot harder, and a lot more violently' if it doesn't sign a deal soon.
tag_reason: 이전 7일 소스에 'love tap' 개념 없음. 트럼프의 신규 수사적 프레이밍.
